contentBlocks.original:
अन्नब्रह्मा रसोविष्णुः
भोक्ता देवो महेश्वरः
एवम् ज्ञात्वा तु यो भुङ्क्ते
अन्नदोषो न लिप्यते
contentBlocks.transliteration:
annabrahmā rasoviṣṇuḥ
bhoktā devo maheśvaraḥ
evam jñātvā tu yo bhuṅkte
annadoṣo na lipyate
contentBlocks.translation: Food is Brahma, the essence of it is Vishnu, and the one who consumes it is Maheśvara. Knowing this, one who eats food is not tainted by any impurities associated with it.
contentBlocks.meanings: अन्नब्रह्मा (annabrahmā) – food is Brahma (anna:food | brahmā:Brahma); रसोविष्णुः (rasoviṣṇuḥ) – essence is Vishnu (rasaḥ:essence | viṣṇuḥ:Vishnu); भोक्ता (bhoktā) – consumer; देवो (devo) – god; महेश्वरः (maheśvaraḥ) – Maheśvara; एवम् (evam) – thus; ज्ञात्वा (jñātvā) – knowing; तु (tu) – but; यः (yaḥ) – who; भुङ्क्ते (bhuṅkte) – eats; अन्नदोषः (annadoṣaḥ) – food impurity (anna:food | doṣaḥ:impurity); न (na) – not; लिप्यते (lipyate) – is tainted;
